mapper.sql: id, username, email, password_hash, company, is_active, failed_login_attempts, locked_until, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( id, username, email, password_hash, company, is_active, failed_login_attempts, locked_until, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{passwordHash,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{company,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isActive,jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, #{failedLoginAttempts,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{lockedUntil,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )

INSERT INTO users
id, username, email, password_hash, company, is_active, failed_login_attempts, locked_until, created_at, updated_at,
#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{passwordHash,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{company,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isActive,jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, #{failedLoginAttempts,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{lockedUntil,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, password_hash = #{passwordHash,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, company = #{company,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_active = #{isActive,jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, failed_login_attempts = #{failedLoginAttempts,jdbcType=INTEGER}, locked_until = #{lockedUntil,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_at = #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

UPDATE users SET failed_login_attempts = COALESCE(failed_login_attempts, 0) + #{attempts,jdbcType=INTEGER}, locked_until = #{lockedUntil,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
UPDATE users SET failed_login_attempts = 0, locked_until = NULL, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
